transcript.text:
[There's a new tangerine here]
[I am a Winter Prince]
[So what's today's mukbang?]
[3kg of Jeju Black Pig]
Are you guys eating too?
[Yes we are]
[Grill on 1 side]
[Charcoal on the other]
It's 7 people. we're going to win for sure
-Can you finish it? -I can finish 3kgs
[She's a professional Mukbanger]
[Let's speed it up]
[An extra helper]
Have you finished already?
[Who will finish this 1v7 competition?]
[Welcomed by a clear sky]

[And emerald waters]
[It's Jeju island]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jeju island's tangerine farm
Can you see this here?
It's just full of tangerines
I love eating tangerines
There's a new tangerine that's out, so I'm here to check it out
Hello
The tangerine is so big
Bigger than my fist
It's this big
Excuse me
What is this "new" tangerine?
This is Winter Prince
It was first invented in a citrus laboratory

It has thin layers and soft insides
It has good flavors
It's as big as an orange
I've never seen one this big
[It peels right off]
It's really easy to peel
It comes off just like this
The scent(?) is really nice
It's really sweet
And it peels off easily Explosion of goodness
Use the scissors to cut it off
I've been wanting to try How do I do it?
[Cut it off the stems and clean it up after]
[So focused]
[2 in 1]
[Helping out the owner]

[Would you like to work here?]
He came to watch you eat
[Tzuyang's subscriber]
[Let's finish it up here]
[Carrying it out together]
They prefer these tangerines because they are so easy to peel
And the flavor is very good
You eat a lot
They are in season right now
It's even better than the one I just had
[What will be our mukbang menu at this tangerine farm?]
I've never grilled at a farm like this
They prepared Jeju black pig pork belly for me here
About 3kgs
I will enjoy them together
Jeju Black Pig

You like those, right?
[Let's get some Winter Prince while we wait for the grill]
I've never seen it peel so easily
[You're doing a good job]
Peel it right off, Winter Prince
[It's time to grill now]
Eating kbbq here feels so weird
Has this happened before?
I've been wanting to meet you since you're a good eater
Thank you for preparing this for me
[Enjoy]
Can I cook this too? Let's try it
[Kimchi on the side]
-Do you not feel uncomfortable eating that much? -I'm okay
These are cutting off easily too
Jeju island's black pig is the best

Let's stand up and do it
This feels like I'm cutting beef
You can run a kbbq restaurant
Really?
Are they eating too?
[We're eating too]
We'll eat 3kgs too
7 of us
Are they grilling now?
[We have charcoal]
Can you finish everything?
3kgs is easy
I'll start now Bon appetit
Even better than beef, right?
Yes it is
It's not comparable to a regular pork belly

This is really really really amazing
It's different
If the shoulder blade is good, then everything else is good Let's try it
Hot
[Eating tangerines now?]
[Not bad]
She's a good eater
It's as chewy as intestines
Let's try the cooked Winter Prince
It's like drinking a citrus tea
They started grilling too
We will win of course
It's 7 of us
You won't be able to finish all of this
[So go easy on us]
This won't taste as good if you overcook it

Some tangerines when you get thirsty
How does it peel so easily?
[1 additional member to help out]
-Tangerines too? -Yes
They're really tasty
Are you almost finished?
We're all pretty full right now
I did my best
Let us grill some more too
How can all of us not eat as much as 1 person there?
[They're starting to give up]
I wonder how it tastes grilled with charcoal
Do you want this?
Delicious
Who's going to eat all of that?
The meat part needs to be eaten right now

Amazing
Some salt all around
Amazing
It's so good
I like eating fat, but I like the meat too
Let's eat 1 more tangerine
I've pulled it right off
You took everything off
I cut it and it came off like this
Pork with Winter Prince
-It tastes special, right? -It's delicious
It's good Much better than you think
It neutralizes the greasiness
How is it so good?
-Are you guys finished? -We couldn't finish it all
We're almost 10 people now

And we can eat more than 1 person
You shouldn't be eating all of that
Pork belly this time
Take that to Seoul and eat it there
It's better to eat it here
[Just stop eating]
[It doesn't seem like she'll be stopping]
Good thing about the Winter Prince is that you can take out about 3 of them out,
And save the rest in your pocket
It really goes well together
Just when it starts to get greasy
We will be grateful if you are able to promote our products for the good of our farms
[A lot of weight on her shoulders]
[I believe in you]
These are Winter Prince
Invented here in South Korea

Your love and support will be a big help to our farms here
They are really tasty too
Thanks everyone
I'm here at the tangerine museum
So many of them here
I haven't been to a museum in a while
[Learning about the history of tangerines]
[What's this?]
[And try different activities]
[Bye Jeju Island~!]
